Event Marketing & Campaign

Talwiinder
Concert Tour Marketing

Client
Talwiinder
Category
Event Marketing & Campaign
Year
2023–2024
Status
Completed

Overview

Ninearc spearheaded the full-scale planning and execution of the Talwiinder Concert in Toronto, managing every aspect from venue selection and logistics to audience engagement and full marketing execution.

The Challenge

The challenge was creating a campaign that would resonate with diverse audiences across Canada while maximising ticket sales and building Talwiinder's brand in the Canadian market — all within a tight promotional window and with the need to generate genuine cultural momentum.

Our Approach

Our team developed a comprehensive marketing campaign across social media, email, and local advertising channels, creating a buzz that reached diverse audiences and amplified ticket sales. We designed content that highlighted the artist's brand, shared behind-the-scenes moments, and leveraged targeted promotions to maximise visibility. Ninearc's integrated approach ensured seamless event operations, high engagement, and measurable impact.
